# JobCrafts AI

JobCrafts AI is a web application that helps job seekers improve job application outcomes using AI tools.

## Core capabilities
- Resume upload and parsing
- ATS resume optimization and scoring
- Cover letter generation
- Interview preparation support
- LinkedIn optimization
- Career gap analysis

## Main pages
- https://jobcraftsai.com/
- https://jobcraftsai.com/pricing

## Product summary
JobCrafts AI provides practical AI workflows for resume quality, ATS alignment, and interview readiness. It supports both free and paid plans.
